subject: Re: FEOY 2007 finalist in town
body:
ok office today


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 8, 2007 6:56:22 PM
Subject: FW: FEOY 2007 finalist in town


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: BEHNBOM@aol.com [mailto:BEHNBOM@aol.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, May 08, 2007 5:31 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: FEOY 2007 finalist in town


Hello Leslie, if Jeffrey is in town maybe he wants to meet a strong finalist for this year's Female Economist of the Year? Emma Martensson is here thru Friday, she can be reached m: 01146 7 03030138 or let me know!I hope he has received the invitation for the cermoni June 4th in Stockholm at the Confidencen Theatre, we would just love to have him there, I could even ignore him and not thank him officially..it is only thanks to him and his continous support for this scholarship and the growing network of BBB that we can continue all of this!!! Anyway, I am supposed to fly over on the 17th and would love to stop by to see him before I leave. All the Best, Barbro






See what's free at AOL.com.
